Human.description: Baseline survivors from the surface cities. Jack-of-all-trades with no severe weaknesses. Neutral faction standing.

Mutant.description: Radiation-scarred adaptors hardened by the wastes. +Health, +RAD resist, −Hunger cap. Tough but constantly hungry.

SentientAI.description: Conscious machine minds housed in synthetic bodies. +Energy (stamina), −Health. High stamina, fragile frame. No food drain bonus.

Cyborg.description: Chrome grafted onto flesh. +Health, −Energy. Durable frame with power-hungry implants. Tech synergy.

Chthon.description: Pale, elongated humanoids adapted to darkness. Many have glowing veins and subtle mutations. +Hunger resistance, +RAD resist, −Energy. Closest to “surface humans” but deeply changed by the Underearth.

Vesperid.description: Insectoid-human hybrids with chitin plating and compound eyes. +Health, +RAD resist, −Hunger. Often seen as eerie or monstrous by Upworlders. Extremely durable.

Nullborn.description: Beings touched by the void between realities. Their forms flicker; unnatural calm. +Energy, +RAD resist, −Health. Extremely rare. Some say they are partially unmade.

Revenant.description: Reanimated corpses kept alive by Underearth tech or parasites. +Health, +Hunger resist, −Energy. Not truly undead — more like “biologically repurposed.” Hard to kill, costly to sustain.
